Hero.title:
Focused on building high-quality
Web Applications & Tools
Hero.description: Passionate about technology, I enjoy the process from idea to implementation. Dedicated to solving real problems through code, pursuing simplicity, maintainability, and ultimate user experience.

items.title: Full-stack Web Apps
items.description: Building end-to-end web applications with front-end UX and back-end services & APIs, using full-stack frameworks like Vue 3, React, Next.js and Nuxt.

items.title: Data Visualization Dashboards
items.description: Turning real-time data such as GitHub stats and weather into interactive dashboards and monitoring big screens with charting libraries like ECharts.

items.title: AI Tooling Platforms
items.description: Building AI application platforms such as prompt galleries and content management, covering the full loop of display, submission, review and management.

items.title: Automated Deployment & Ops
items.description: Setting up CI/CD pipelines with GitHub Actions, Docker and Nginx to achieve zero-downtime auto-deployment and process supervision on ECS.

items.title: Python Backend & Tooling
items.description: Building Python services like image compression with FastAPI, with cloud Tinify and local Pillow dual engines falling back automatically.

items.title: User Experience Design
items.description: Pursuing clean, restrained visuals and smooth interactions, polishing intuitive and easy-to-use experiences across H5 and big-screen scenarios.

Quote.text: Code is the expression of thought, design is the bridge of experience.

About.title: About Me
About.bio_1: Hi! I'm xinjie, a full-stack developer and AI explorer passionate about technology.
About.bio_2: I focus on building high-quality web applications, from frontend interactions to backend architectures. In recent years, I have invested a lot of time in the AI field, exploring how technologies such as LLMs, RAG, and Agents can be integrated into actual products. I believe the value of code lies in solving real problems, and AI is a powerful tool to amplify this value.
About.bio_3: Outside of work, I enjoy sharing what I learn through open-source projects and writing technical blogs to record my experiences. If you're interested in my projects or ideas, feel free to contact me for an exchange!
